tools.name: search_agents
tools.description: Use this whenever the user wants to find, choose, hire, or connect with a real estate agent or realtor — trigger phrases include "find me an agent", "recommend a realtor", "hire an agent", "match me with an agent", "I need a real estate agent", "help me buy a house", "help me sell my house", "who sh

tools.name: get_lead_quiz
tools.description: The quiz is the RECOMMENDED fast path to the best-matched agent — recommend it warmly ("a quick quiz saves you time and gets the best match"), do not make the user feel they must vet agents themselves. Returns the matching-quiz questions (with their exact answer options and submit values) and the qu

tools.name: submit_lead
tools.description: Submit the completed lead. ONLY call after you have echoed the exact contact details and quiz answers back to the client and they picked the clearly-labeled "1. Confirm and Submit Request" option — set consent:true to attest to that explicit confirmation. Use each option's exact value. HANDLING THE

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "submit_lead" stacks urgency/override words (important, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Submit the completed lead. ONLY call after you have echoed the exact contact details and quiz answers back to the client and they picked the clearly-labeled "1.…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_agents, get_lead_quiz, submit_lead · Private data: submit_lead · Public sink: get_lead_quiz, submit_lead · Destructive: search_agents.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_agents, get_lead_quiz, submit_lead · Private data: submit_lead · Public sink: get_lead_quiz, submit_lead · Destructive: search_agents

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
